title: Fazcraft [Minecraft X FNAF]
description: Adds all of your favorite Fazbear friends to your Minecraft world; alongside countless new blocks, tools, and more!
body:
Latest updates require Patchouli and GeckoLib to run properly!

GeckoLib
Patchouli

BACK UP YOUR WORLDS BEFORE UPDATING!!!!!

 

If you're reading this you know what you're here for. Freddy and his friends have invaded your Minecraft world, and with them comes a whole slew of items, weapons, glitches, threats, and... wait, what?

 

 

 

Fazcraft adds plenty of terrifying new entities to your world from the critically acclaimed Five Nights at Freddy's franchise by Scott Cawthon. Freddy, Bonnie, Chica, and Foxy would love to play with you!

 

 

 


 

 

 Fight for your life as Freddy only grows stronger, struggle to outrun Foxy as he rushes you down, be beaten senseless as Bonnie teleports around you-- each animatronic will threaten you with something new and unique! 

 

 

 


 

 

Many animatronics feature unique drops; a bib that makes food more filling, an icicle that slows foes down on hit, or even a propeller cap to slow your descents! There's tons of loot to discover, do you think you can get it all?

 

 

 


 

 

With tons of custom FNaF-themed blocks, posters, furniture, decor, and more, there are nearly countless possibilities for building your own Pizzeria! What kind of fast-food murder factory will you create?

 

 

 

 




This is a personal project for me to both learn Minecraft modding, as well as to enjoy with friends. Updates may come quickly, updates may come slowly. I am constantly listening to suggestions and actively encourage them! All I want is to make something people enjoy.

 

I hope you enjoy what I have so far.
